description: The four canonical First-White-Night beats (VERTICAL_SLICE_SPEC.md section 3) assembled from the committed GLBs; the Phase 2 vertical-slice aesthetic-gate proof renders. Standalone stand-in for the Unity in-engine canonical capture (ScreenshotCapture.CaptureCanonicalShots).

beats.phase2_day_camp.png: Bucolic daylight over the meadow camp.
beats.phase2_dusk_recall.png: Colour drains, warm low sun, fire pools rising.
beats.phase2_night_attack.png: Near-dark; only firelight pools; pale hounds at the edge of the light, the Black Hound readable at the ruined tower.
beats.phase2_morning_after.png: Soft first light over the settlement that endured.
